text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you good at art?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Me? Well... Let me tell you what<n>happened while
we were drawing our<n>friends during art class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My friend took one look at my work and<n>asked,
"Is this an alien or something?"<n>Can you imagine?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Surely you know... what this means?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My artistic prowess extends beyond the<n>very stars
themselves! All hail Superstar<n>Artist Bakushin!
